name: Forge Innovation Development Corp.
summary: Forge Innovation Development Corp., a development stage company, focuses on commercial and residential land development business in the United States. The company intends to invest in development projects; purchase and sell real estate properties; and provide property management services. It is also involved in online retail business. The company was formerly known as You-Go enterprises, LLC and changed its name to Forge Innovation Development Corp. in November 2016. Forge Innovation Development Corp. was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Jurupa Valley, California.
